ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the path to where you want to export converted vault.
ast.target: 指定要导出转换后 Vault 的路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the file, which will be your Gitlab homepage.
ast.target: 指定文件，它将作为你的 Gitlab 主页。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 开始进行 Vault 转换和导出...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Export failed! Could not find home file in vault. Make sure the specified home file path is correct.
ast.target: 导出失败！在 Vault 中未找到主页文件。请确保指定的主页文件路径正确。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Vault conversion and export finished successfully!
ast.target: Vault 转换和导出已成功完成！

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Export failed! Select a valid Gitlab home page in the settings before exporting vault.
ast.target: 导出失败！请在设置中选择有效的 Gitlab 主页后再导出 Vault。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将 Vault 导出为 Gitlab Wiki
